memoryArtifacts.description: * Thomas Whitbred, the son of Christopher Whitbred and Maude French had two sons named Thomas, both by his first wife Dennys Burles (als Sponer). The first was baptised in September 1541 and buried in …

popularStory.headline: THOMAS WRIGHT, 1396 TO 1492
popularStory.description: Thomas Wright was born in White Notley, Essex County, England in 1396. He became the lord of the manor in which he was born and was later “ennobled,” that is, made a member of the peerage and given a …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Rev. Thomas Wright於1396年出生在英國艾可懷特 諾特利時，他的父親Lord John Christopher Whitbread51歲，母親Dorothy Jean Bauer42歲。他和Lady Agnes Hunt至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1452年4月3日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾洛維爾 格拉文爾斯特享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Wright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a craftsman or maker of machinery, mostly in wood, of any of a wide range of kinds, from Middle English and Older Scots wriht, wright, wricht, writh, write (Old English wyrhta, wryhta) ‘craftsman’, especially ‘carpenter, joiner’. The term is found in various combinations (for example, Cartwright and Wainwright ), but when used in isolation it often referred to a builder of windmills or watermills. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Wrights
meanings: English: variant of Wright , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wrightsman
meanings: Probably English (although no longer found in Britain), meaning‘servant of the wright’ (see   Wright  ).

variants.name: Cartwright
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): occupational name from Middle English cart(e) ‘cart’ + wright(e) ‘craftsman’ (Old English cræt or Old Norse kartr + Old English wyrhta), for a cartwright, a maker of carts.
Variant of   Courtright  , a surname of Dutch origin.

variants.name: Wrightson
meanings: English (northern England, especially Durham): patronymic from   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: McWright
meanings: Scottish or Irish: Gaelic patronymic with the English and Scots occupational term   Wright  , meaning ‘son of the wright’. The name is possibly a part translation of   McIntyre  , which fully translates as ‘son of the wright’.

variants.name: Wrightman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English wright ‘craftsman’ (see Wright ) + man ‘man’, denoting someone who assisted a craftsman.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Rev. Thomas Wright was born in 1396, in White Notley, Essex, England, his father, Lord John Christopher Whitbread, was 51 and his mother, Dorothy Jean Bauer, was 42. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Lady Agnes Hunt. He died on 3 April 1452, in Lower Gravenhurst, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

Thomas Wright est né en 1396, à White Notley, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Lord John Christopher Whitbread, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Jean Bauer, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Lady Agnes Hunt. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1452, à Lower Gravenhurst, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Rev. Thomas Wrightが1396年にイギリスエセックスウィト ノトリーで生まれた時，父Lord John Christopher Whitbreadは51歳，母Dorothy Jean Bauerは42歳であった。彼はLady Agnes Huntとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1452年4月3日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアロウエル グラベンハルストで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Rev. Thomas Wright(이)가 1396년 영국 에세스 휘트 노틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John Christopher Whitbread(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Jean Bauer(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Lady Agnes Hunt(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 4월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 로어 그레이븐후르스트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.
